global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent cashback offer and a brand logo.

elements.label: Light gray background
elements.description: A light gray background that fills the entire canvas, providing a neutral base for the ad.

elements.label: App interface mockup
elements.description: A rectangular mockup of an app interface with rounded corners, featuring placeholder shapes for content.

elements.label: Main text message
elements.description: Bold, large text that reads 'Earn cashback daily', prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Subtext description
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message that reads 'Fast signup, instant card', providing additional information.

elements.label: Circular icons
elements.description: Three circular shapes arranged vertically, serving as decorative elements without specific content.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Learn more', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: A small rectangular shape that appears to be an additional decorative or functional element.

elements.label: Additional circular element
elements.description: A circular shape positioned near the bottom of the ad, likely serving a decorative purpose.

elements.label: Main promotional message
elements.description: A bold headline at the bottom of the ad that emphasizes the cashback offer.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Fast Learn more

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner that reads 'CoinBridge', indicating the brand identity.
